result: I would make every human mind naturally, irresistibly curious about every other human mind—so that “difference” feels like a door to walk through, not a wall to defend against. No coercion, no loss of individuality—just an built-in, joyful compulsion to understand how the person in front of you actually experiences being alive. Bigotry would starve, loneliness would shrink, and the best parts of every culture would circulate like oxygen. One change, but it would unwind most of the others.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
